issues.title: Failing test won't fail (scope=mine already filters)
issues.attack: GET /projects/ defaults to scope=mine which already filters by assigned_consultants|created_by. The test's Not Assigned project (created_by=owner) wouldn't be shown to consultant even before changes.
issues.response: Confirmed by both models. Test must hit scope=all and verify created_by alone doesn't grant visibility.

issues.title: Variable name mismatch (qs vs projects)
issues.attack: Plan uses qs but function uses projects throughout. Agent could add dead code or break the view.
issues.response: Confirmed. Fix: use projects as variable name, directly replacing line 84.

issues.title: --timeout=30 not available
issues.attack: pytest-timeout not in pyproject.toml. Step 4 command will fail.
issues.response: Confirmed. Change to uv run pytest -v.

issues.title: Owner test insufficient (only tests own project)
issues.attack: Owner test creates one project by owner. scope=mine would show it regardless. Need project by another user.
issues.response: Confirmed. Add second user and project, test with scope=all.

issues.title: Missing viewer role test
issues.attack: Design spec includes viewer role but no test covers it.
issues.response: Confirmed. Use pytest.mark.parametrize for consultant and viewer roles.

issues.title: Missing imports in test snippet
issues.attack: Test snippet doesn't show all imports.
issues.response: test_rbac.py already has imports at lines 1-8. Only Client/Project/ProjectStatus need adding, which are shown in the snippet.
